summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lacucina kitchen inventory management application. All core features working excellently with 100% backend API success rate and full frontend functionality.

minor_issues.impact: Email sending not available but fails gracefully
minor_issues.note: Expected behavior - system handles missing API key properly

minor_issues.issue: Chart library console warnings about width/height dimensions
minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic console warnings, charts display correctly

passed_tests: Units CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Sections CRUD operations with seed data
Items CRUD operations with section relationships
Safety stock configuration by day of week
Order calculation with safety stock logic
Frontend login page rendering and styling
Dashboard loading with real data display
Navigation between all pages (Sections, Items, Daily Entry, Orders, Reports, Settings)
Critical items table with proper data
Responsive design and professional UI styling
